title: willClose fails to null mod-source display and sidechain indicator pointers (dangling after editor close)
Mod-source view sub-view pointers dangle on ModSourceViewMode switch (use-after-free)
onTabChanged omits rungler/sampleHold/random displays and sidechain indicators (MOD-tab residents left dangling)
Unison partial-group steal can allocate the same voice slot multiple times
Stale portamento glide replays on voice reuse, overriding the new note's pitch
Reverb type crossfade double-processes the tail of the completion block through the incoming reverb
Effect-mix and all-voice modulation leave stale values when the modulation source stops (guarded by != 0.0f)
OSC A/B Level (and per-sample OscLevel modulation) are silently ignored in SpectralMorph mix mode
Duplicate VST3 ParamID 3400: kArpVelocityCurveAmountId aliases kSidechainActiveId
Reverb type-crossfade double-processes the completing block's tail through the incoming reverb
Reverb crossfade equal-power blend swells the correlated dry signal by ~+3 dB at midpoint
Delay and Reverb enable/disable are hard bool toggles with no fade (tail cut / click)
OscAParams and OscBParams are fully duplicated (~800 lines each, byte-identical modulo A/B)
OSC A / OSC B parameter headers are ~90% copy-paste duplicates
Inconsistent param dispatch: flanger/chorus applied inline with magic scaling, unlike every other effect
FormantFilter::process() recomputes all 5 biquad coefficient sets (5×sin + 5×cos) every sample
Phaser recomputes the same allpass coefficient (a std::tan) once per stage every sample
Phaser sweep-frequency mapping calls std::pow three times per sample per channel
setBinary() heap-allocates on the audio thread in sendVoiceModRouteState(), despite pre-warm comment claiming otherwise
Mono mode processes the voice one sample at a time via processBlock(&sample, 1)
kNumParameters sentinel (3401) is smaller than many valid parameter IDs (arp block runs to kArpEndId = 3445)
MIDI note events are not sample-accurate: event.sampleOffset is discarded
kVoiceDestParamIds constant duplicated across two translation units
Arp velocity-curve / transpose IDs (kArpVelocityCurveTypeId 3399, kArpVelocityCurveAmountId 3400, kArpTransposeId 3401) are declared but never registered, processed, saved, or loaded
getActiveVoiceCount() reports 0 in Mono mode while a voice is sounding
Muted harmonizer voices freeze their smoothers and cut abruptly in non-PhaseVocoder paths
RingModulator::reset() zeroes frequency smoothers instead of snapping to effective frequency, causing a carrier pitch chirp on every reset
LFO fade-in increment not recomputed on sample-rate change in prepare()
ChaosWaveshaper Henon 'continuous output' interpolation is not implemented; prevHenonX_ is dead
OSC dropdown string tables defined in dropdown_mappings.h are unused; identical literals hardcoded twice in osc_a/osc_b register functions
chorus_params.h and flanger_params.h are near-identical param modules (not consolidated like LFO)
Flanger and Chorus DSP-dispatch switch blocks in processor_params.cpp are near-duplicates
Logarithmic normalized<->units mapping helpers duplicated across LFO / env-follower / pitch-follower params
God-function: applyParamsToEngine() is ~920 lines of flat setter dispatch
Duplicated 30-element OSC value arrays in applyParamsToEngine
Magic number: hardcoded voice count 16 despite RuinaeEngine::kMaxPolyphony constant
Magic number: arp step count 32 repeated 9+ times without a shared named constant
Leftover debug-logging scaffolding with 'remove after debugging' notes
RuinaeVoice filter loop sets cutoff on BOTH SVF stages every sample even when second stage is unused (wasted std::tan/sample)
RingModulator recomputes std::sin per sample for the Gordon-Smith sine carrier, defeating the magic-circle optimization
Phaser and Flanger use std::tanh in the per-sample feedback path while FastMath::fastTanh is available
sendMessage() invoked from the audio thread (process()) — synchronous host/controller connection call
